cookieBannerBody: This site uses cookies and local storage for essential features only (sign-in, preferences, and continuity). Ads and optional analytics are off for now and may be enabled later with your consent.
cookiePrefsBody: Essential cookies are required for sign-in, preferences, and core site features. The options below cover optional ads and measurement — currently inactive.
cookieAdsHelp: Optional future ads — may be enabled later subject to Google approval and configuration.
cookieAnalyticsHelp: Optional anonymous measurement — may be enabled later subject to configuration.
